Dynamic handheld shot in modern social-first product photography style with bright natural window light, SCARLETT wearing light casual beach clothing suitable for walking and carrying a canvas tote bag stands at the open window inside the bright Bondi studio, holding the (CORAL_LIPSTICK) and swiping across her lips in one quick motion with muscles tensed and mid-breath energy, pale marble vanity table visible beside her, expansive ocean view through the open window, crisp white surfaces throughout the modern coastal interior, direct sunlight slicing across the marble creating clean directional shadows and high-key airy atmosphere, shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh on the background ocean, eye-level camera angle emphasizing the real-life interaction, clean bright color grading with true-to-life tones and lifted shadows

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - DAY
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim metallic lipstick tube containing a vivid bright coral bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
